name: Independence War™ Deluxe Edition
short_description: A guerilla war has been raging in space for centuries. Human colonies are breaking away from Earth's control, declaring independence from the Commonwealth. As a Commonwealth Navy commander, your mission is to stop the Indie rebels and their attacks of terror and random piracy.
detailed_description:
It's a sophisticated, interstellar battle for life, and you must fight your way along the path between duty and justice. With luck and skill you can secure a victory for mankind.

  • Includes the original Independence War and and its expansion pack: Defiance.
  • Take command of a 8520-ton, 160-meter long starship - a Dreadnought-class corvette
  • Sophisticated and diverse gameplay featuring detailed ship systems, accurate physics and more
